flags.concern: Effect preview wrapping: the plan's proposed canonical helper signature is too narrow to replace the preview path as written. `makePreviewComposition()` wraps a compiled `EffectComponent` directly rather than looking up a type in a built-in map, so Step 3 cannot call a helper shaped as `(content, effectType, builtInMap, config)` without redesigning that API.
flags.evidence: Revised plan to address all four flags: (1) Redesigned canonical helper to accept a resolved component rather than type+builtInMap, so the preview path (which has a pre-compiled component) can use it without lookup; (2) Changed effectFrames contract to always pass durationInFrames for continuous effects (matching majority behavior in EffectLayerSequence and preview), fixing wrapWithClipEffects to match rather than forcing undefined; (3) Fixed the race condition at the registry level with a post-await code comparison check, with the stale boolean as belt-and-suspenders; (4) Added Step 4 to fix the EffectLayerSequence timing bug using nested Sequences for frame offset compensation.

flags.concern: Effect contract: forcing `effectFrames` to `undefined` for continuous effects is a breaking contract change for custom effects. The current preview and effect-layer paths both pass the full duration for continuous effects, and custom effect templates already consume `effectFrames`, so switching those callers to `undefined` would silently change runtime behavior for existing continuous custom effects.
flags.evidence: Revised plan to address all four flags: (1) Redesigned canonical helper to accept a resolved component rather than type+builtInMap, so the preview path (which has a pre-compiled component) can use it without lookup; (2) Changed effectFrames contract to always pass durationInFrames for continuous effects (matching majority behavior in EffectLayerSequence and preview), fixing wrapWithClipEffects to match rather than forcing undefined; (3) Fixed the race condition at the registry level with a post-await code comparison check, with the stale boolean as belt-and-suspenders; (4) Added Step 4 to fix the EffectLayerSequence timing bug using nested Sequences for frame offset compensation.

flags.concern: Effect registry concurrency: the proposed `stale` boolean in `useEffectRegistry` does not actually close the async overwrite race. Once an old `registerAsync()` call has started compiling, its awaited result still writes into the shared registry after completion, so an older effect payload can overwrite a newer one even if the outer effect has already been cleaned up.
flags.evidence: Revised plan to address all four flags: (1) Redesigned canonical helper to accept a resolved component rather than type+builtInMap, so the preview path (which has a pre-compiled component) can use it without lookup; (2) Changed effectFrames contract to always pass durationInFrames for continuous effects (matching majority behavior in EffectLayerSequence and preview), fixing wrapWithClipEffects to match rather than forcing undefined; (3) Fixed the race condition at the registry level with a post-await code comparison check, with the stale boolean as belt-and-suspenders; (4) Added Step 4 to fix the EffectLayerSequence timing bug using nested Sequences for frame offset compensation.

flags.concern: Effect layers: the plan touches `EffectLayerSequence` but misses that effect-layer animations are using the global Remotion frame instead of a frame relative to the layer start. Any continuous effect layer that starts after frame 0 will begin mid-animation or fully progressed, so the refactor would preserve a visible timing bug in one of the main files under review.
flags.evidence: Revised plan to address all four flags: (1) Redesigned canonical helper to accept a resolved component rather than type+builtInMap, so the preview path (which has a pre-compiled component) can use it without lookup; (2) Changed effectFrames contract to always pass durationInFrames for continuous effects (matching majority behavior in EffectLayerSequence and preview), fixing wrapWithClipEffects to match rather than forcing undefined; (3) Fixed the race condition at the registry level with a post-await code comparison check, with the stale boolean as belt-and-suspenders; (4) Added Step 4 to fix the EffectLayerSequence timing bug using nested Sequences for frame offset compensation.
